content.claim: SNI student enrollment in Hungary has increased by 40% over the past 20 years, with 112,007 children registered in the 2024/2025 school year, representing nearly 10% of primary school students and over 11% by 8th grade
content.context: Fresh live research through the Education finance lens
limitations: Source is secondary aggregator rather than primary KSH statistical release
No breakdown provided of whether increase reflects true prevalence change versus improved identification/diagnostic practice
Most recent data point is single school year (2024/25) without multi-year trend confidence intervals
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
